name: Vector
tagline: Sleek, intelligent, and built for those who demand more from every journey.
description: Vector combines aerodynamic precision with a premium interior crafted for pure comfort and complete control.

features.title: Intelligent Cockpit
features.description: 15.6" center display with AI voice control.

features.title: Premium Sound
features.description: 23-speaker audio system for an immersive experience.

features.title: Advanced Safety
features.description: L2+ driver assistance for every journey.

name: Cloud
tagline: Spacious, versatile, and ready for life's biggest adventures.
description: Cloud is engineered for comfort, versatility, and confidence on any road, in any weather.

features.title: Large Cargo Space
features.description: Up to 2,100 L with folded seats.

features.title: Panoramic Roof
features.description: Bring the sky inside with a wide view.

name: Bullet
tagline: Instant torque. Zero emissions. Pure adrenaline.
description: Bullet delivers thrilling performance with agile handling and a design that stands out.

features.title: Smart Display
features.description: TFT dashboard with ride modes and navigation.

features.title: Portable Charging
features.description: Charge anywhere with a standard plug.
